description_long: This object is a thick, rectangular book with a hard cover, featuring a prominent spine and a visibly layered structure that suggests a substantial number of pages. The front and back covers are flat and unadorned, with a subtle grid pattern visible on one side, possibly indicating a utilitarian or technical design. The spine is wide and solid, with no visible text or decorative elements, and the book appears to be closed. The edges of the pages are clean and uniform, and the book's overall form is blocky and robust, suggesting durability. The underside of the book reveals a series of circular holes, which may be a stylized design element or a representation of ventilation or binding features. The color is a uniform light gray, giving the book a minimalist and modern appearance.
description: A thick, hard-covered book with a wide spine, clean edges, and a minimalist light gray design. The covers are flat, with a subtle grid pattern on one side and circular holes visible on the underside.
description_view_0: Front cover view showing the grid pattern on the left and a solid right side, with the spine running vertically in the center and circular holes visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the book, the wide spine, and the clean, flat covers with no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: Back cover view, similar to the front but with the grid pattern on the right and a solid left side, and the same circular holes at the bottom.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the spine bisecting the book, the grid pattern on one half, and the layered structure of the covers and pages.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is wide, solid, and light gray with no visible text or decorative elements. It has a minimalist, unadorned appearance.
